何も起こらないのが一番いいのだけど……: It would be best if nothing happened...
目を閉じて身体の力を抜くと、眠気が襲ってきた。: When I closed my eyes and let my body go limp, drowsiness washed over me.
それに抗うことなど出来ず、ぼくの意識は急激に遠ざかっていった。: Unable to resist it, my consciousness rapidly drifted away.
首を巡らせて詩音さんのベッドを見る。: I turned my head and looked at Shion-san's bed.
用を足しに行ったのかな……: Maybe she went to use the bathroom...
それにしても、ぼくに一言も声を掛けなかったのは気になる。: Even so, it bothers me that she didn't say a single word to me.
起こさないように気を遣ってくれたのか、それとも……: Did she take care not to wake me, or...
何かあるとするならば……確かめなければならない。: If it is something... I have to make sure.
階段を下りてきて寒さに身体を震わせた。: I went down the stairs and shivered at the cold.
身体が揺さぶられたような気がして目が醒めた。: I woke up with the feeling that my body had been shaken.
扉から外を見る。: I looked out from the doorway.
吹雪の中、事務室の扉の前に、詩音さんが佇んでいた。: Through the blizzard, in front of the office door, Shion-san was standing still.
ぼくの呼びかけにも答えず、彼女は館に入っていく。: Without even answering my call, she went into the manor.
事務室に入り再度呼びかける。: I entered the office and called out to her again.
どこを見ているかわからない虚ろな視線。: A hollow gaze that I couldn't tell where she was looking.
ずっと居たのに、まるで虚を突かれたよな表情でぼくを見る。: Even though I'd been right there, she looked at me with an expression as if she'd been caught off guard.
膝から頽れた詩音さんを慌てて抱え起こす。: I hurried to catch Shion-san as she collapsed from her knees.
気を喪っているようだ。: She seemed to have lost consciousness.
いや……気を喪っているというよりも、ただ眠っていると云う感じだった。: No... it felt more like she was simply asleep rather than having lost consciousness.
御巫先生を呼びに行こうか迷ったが、ぼくは詩音さんの身体を抱き上げた。: I hesitated over whether to go call Dr. Mikanagi, but I picked Shion-san up.
部屋に戻そう。: I'll take her back to her room.
軽々と塔の二階まで運び、彼女をベッドに寝かせる。: I easily carried her to the second floor of the tower and laid her on the bed.
ぼくは布団をかけ直してやり、部屋の隅で毛布を被って蹲った。: I adjusted the covers for her, wrapped myself in a blanket in the corner of the room, and crouched down.
出来る限り起きているようにしよう。: I'll try to stay awake as much as possible.
詩音さんに何かがあってもすぐ対応出来るように。: So I can respond immediately if anything happens to Shion-san.
……藍さんのつま先が僅かに浮いている。: ...Ai-san's toes were hovering just slightly above the ground.
どれだけ時間が経過したのだろう。: I wonder how much time has passed.
あかねさんが人を呼びに行き、想子さんと御巫先生、それに辻村さんがやって来て藍さん: Akane-san went to call people, and Souko-san, Dr. Mikanagi, and Tsujimura-san arrived and lowered Ai-san to the floor.
藍さんの脈を診た御巫先生が頭を振る。: Dr. Mikanagi, who had checked Ai-san's pulse, shook his head.
ぼくは答えられず、下を向いた。: Unable to answer, I looked down.
想子「……あかねさん、何があったのか教えてもらえますか？」: Souko: "...Akane-san, could you tell me what happened?"
あかねさんだって辛いだろうに、気丈に答えている。: Even though Akane-san must be hurting too, she was answering bravely.
想子「そう……辛かったでしょうね」: Souko: "I see... it must have been tough."
想子「え、じゃないわよ。何とかして犯人を見つけないと……犠牲者はまだ増えるわよ」: Souko: "Don't 'Eh' me. We have to find the culprit somehow... otherwise the number of victims will only increase."
想子「呆けてないで、しっかりしなさい」: Souko: "Don't just daze off, pull yourself together."
想子さんに発破を掛けられ、ぼくは立ち上がった。: Rallied by Souko-san, I stood up.
すぐ傍には藍さんの遺体。: Right beside me was Ai-san's body.
ぼくは暫し黙祷を捧げ、想子さんに向き直った。: I offered a silent prayer for a moment, then turned back to Souko-san.
……恐らくこのロープが、藍さんの命を奪ったのだろう。: ...This rope is likely what took Ai-san's life.
木の棒が落ちている。: A wooden stick is lying there.
床に紙切れのような小さなゴミが落ちている。: A small piece of trash, like a scrap of paper, is lying on the floor.
特に何でもないようだけど……: It doesn't seem to be anything special, but...
何度見てもゴミとしか思えない。: No matter how many times I look at it, it just looks like trash.
御巫先生が藍さんの遺体に手を合わせ、検視を始めた。: Dr. Mikanagi placed his hands together in prayer before Ai-san's body and began the autopsy.
御巫「……頭部に打撲傷がありますが、これは直接の死因ではありませんね。やはり頸部: Mikanagi: "...There's a contusion on the head, but this isn't the direct cause of death. It seems death was indeed caused by suffocation due to neck compression."
……藍さんの死因は窒息死らしい。: ...It seems Ai-san's cause of death was suffocation.
御巫「じゃあ、藍さんの身体を運ぼう。いつまでもこんな所に置いておいては可哀相だ」: Mikanagi: "Well then, let's carry Ai-san's body. It'd be pitiable to leave her in a place like this forever."
藍さんの遺体を真新しいシーツで包む。: We wrapped Ai-san's body in a brand-new sheet.
想子「運ぶのは彼女の部屋へ？」: Souko: "Are we carrying her to her room?"
御巫先生とふたりで協力し、藍さんの遺体を二階へ下ろす。: Cooperating with Dr. Mikanagi, we carried Ai-san's body down to the second floor.
御巫「じゃあ、僕は藍さんを部屋へ連れて行くよ」: Mikanagi: "Well then, I'll take Ai-san to her room."
御巫先生が藍さんの遺体を抱え上げる。: Dr. Mikanagi picked up Ai-san's body.
想子「私たちは広間に行きましょう。みんな揃っているでしょうから」: Souko: "Let's head to the hall. Everyone should be gathered there."
あかね「奥様と御巫先生は医務室におります」: Akane: "The Madam and Dr. Mikanagi are in the infirmary."
ぼくの姿を見てソファから立ち上がる。: She stood up from the sofa upon seeing me.
詩音「……先程あかねさんが探しているようでしたから……私何だか恐ろしくなって……: Shion: "...It seemed as though Akane-san was looking for her earlier... and I grew quite frightened..."
詩音「そうですか……私、何だか怖くて……」: Shion: "Is that so... I'm feeling quite scared..."
智士「大丈夫ですから、心配しないでください」: Satoshi: "It'll be alright, so please don't worry."
ぼくは気休めとも受け取られかねない言葉を掛けた。: I offered words that could easily be taken as empty consolation.
そう思われたとしても、少しでも彼女の不安を和らげたかった。: Even if she thought so, I wanted to ease her anxiety even just a little bit.
詩音「私……部屋へ戻ります」: Shion: "I... I'm going back to my room."
俯いたまま詩音さんが呟く。: Shion-san murmured with her head down.
知らず、そんな言葉が口をついて出た。: Without thinking, those words slipped out.
智士「あまりひとりで行動しない方がいいと思います。……何の確証もありませんけど」: Satoshi: "I think it's better if you don't move around alone. ...I don't have any proof, but."
智士「辻村さんがいればよかったんですけど……少なくとも事務室までは。すぐ傍ですけ: Satoshi: "It'd be better if Tsujimura-san were here... at least as far as the office. It's right nearby, though."
事務室に辻村さんはいなかった。: Tsujimura-san was not in the office.
詩音「あの……ここまでで結構です。外は寒いですから……」: Shion: "Um... this far is enough. It's cold outside, so..."
智士「何があるかわかりませんから、しっかりと鍵を掛けておいてくださいね」: Satoshi: "We don't know what might happen, so please make sure to lock your door firmly."
雪はまだ降っているようだ。: It seemed as though the snow was still falling.
背中を向けた詩音さんに声を掛けていた。: I called out to Shion-san as she turned her back.
智士「あの、やっぱり塔までお送りします」: Satoshi: "Um, I'll walk you to the tower after all."
ぼくは詩音さんに風が当たらないよう、先に外へ出た。: I stepped outside first so Shion-san wouldn't be hit by the wind.
後ろの詩音さんに声を掛ける。: I called out to Shion-san behind me.
そう言う割に、彼女は寒そうに身を縮めていた。: For all she said that, she was huddling up against the cold.
塔の入口まで来ると、詩音さんはそのまま扉を開いた。: When we arrived at the entrance to the tower, Shion-san opened the door just as it was.
智士「……これからはしっかりと施錠した方がいいと思います」: Satoshi: "...I think it'd be better if you kept it locked from now on."
智士「まだ何があるかわかりませんから」: Satoshi: "Because we don't know what might happen yet."
六曜さんを殺した犯人がまだ館内に居るのだから。: The culprit who killed Rokuyou-san is still in the manor, after all.
そう直接的な言動は避けたものの、詩音さんは不安そうに身を竦ませた。: Although I avoided such direct words, Shion-san shrank back anxiously.
暖房が効いているのだろう、中はほのかに暖かかった。: The heating must be working; it was faintly warm inside.
智士「そういや、頭痛はもう大丈夫ですか？」: Satoshi: "By the way, is your headache alright now?"
詩音「……いつもの事ですから、心配は要りません」: Shion: "...It's a regular thing, so there's no need for worry."
これ以上付き添うのも気が引けた。: I felt hesitant to accompany her any further.
階段に足をかけた彼女が振り返る。: She turned back as she set foot on the stairs.
智士「ぼくはこれで。……また後で」: Satoshi: "I'll be going now. ...See you later."
細い道にはふたり分の足跡が残っている。: Two sets of footprints remained on the narrow path.
ぼくの帰りの足跡が、ぼくの後ろに残っていく。: My footprints from my return journey were being left behind me.
やがてこの足跡も消えてしまうだろう。: These footprints will surely disappear eventually.
道の両脇には雪が積まれ、他の場所にはとても行けそうにない。: Snow is piled up on both sides of the path, making it look as though it'd be impossible to go anywhere else.
ぼくは急ぎ足で大広間に戻る事にした。: I decided to hurry back to the Great Hall.
詩音「……ありがとうございます。でも……やっぱりここで……」: Shion: "...Thank you very much. But... I think I'll stay here after all..."
仕方ない、広間に戻ろう。: It can't be helped; I'll return to the hall.
ぼくも広間に戻ろう。: I'll return to the hall too.
誰も居ないことを確認して、屋根裏部屋へ戻ってきた。: After confirming that no one was around, I returned to the attic.
宙に浮いて居る彼女は全く身動きをしない。: She, suspended in mid-air, didn't move an inch.
時計の歯車も動きを止めていた。: The gears of the clock had also ceased their movement.
歯車に絡まったワイヤを外すと、遺体が床に崩れ落ちた。: As I untangled the wire caught in the gears, the corpse crumbled to the floor.
まだやることは残っている。: There was still work to be done.
物置から持ち出した手斧も持ってきている。: I had also brought the hand axe I'd taken from the storage room.
床に寝転がる彼女の遺体の首へ向かって、斧を振り下ろした。: $ I swung the axe down toward the neck of the corpse lying on the floor.
鈍い音が響き、血飛沫と共に頭部が転がっていく。: A dull thud echoed, and the head went rolling away amidst a spray of blood.
血を浴びぬよう細心の注意を払い、壁際へ回り込み窓を開ける。: Taking meticulous care not to be splattered by the blood, I moved to the wall and opened the window.
布切れで頭部を包み込み、雪が深そうな処へ放り投げた。: I wrapped the head in a scrap of cloth and threw it toward a spot where the snow looked deep.
これで――連続した殺人事件と思わせられる。: With this—it will be perceived as a serial murder case.
廊下に出るとちょうど紅緒さんと出くわした。: As I stepped out into the hallway, I happened to run into Benio-san.
紅緒「中々の色男だな」: Benio: "You're quite the lady-killer, aren't you."
紅緒「詩音を送っていったんだろう？」: Benio: "You were walking Shion back, weren't you?"
智士「詩音さんは旦那さんを――六曜さんを亡くしたばかりなんですよ？」: Satoshi: "Shion-san just lost her husband—well, Rokuyou-san—didn't she?"
紅緒「式は不成立だから、<夫婦<めおと>になった訳ではないだろう？」: Benio: "The ceremony wasn't completed, so they never actually became husband and wife, did they?"
紅緒「……好き合っていた訳でもないからな」: Benio: "...It's not as if they were in love, either."
紅緒「――あの塔から解放してくれる者であれば、誰でも良かったのかもしれんな」: Benio: "—I suppose anyone would have sufficed, so long as they were the one to liberate her from that tower."
紅緒「それはそうと、姉上は見付かったのか？」: Benio: "Setting that aside, has my sister been found yet?"
想子「あら、こんな所でどうしたの？」: Souko: "Oh, what are you two doing in a place like this?"
ホールの方から想子さんが歩いてきた。: Souko-san came walking over from the direction of the hall.
智士「想子さん……藍さんがまだ見付からないんです」: Satoshi: "Souko-san... Ai-san hasn't been found yet."
紅緒「ここで話していても仕方あるまい。一旦広間に行って対策を練ろう」: Benio: "There's no point in just talking here. Let's head to the hall for now and figure out our next move."
大広間には摩夜さんと御巫先生がいた。: In the Great Hall were Maya-san and Dr. Mikanagi.
御巫先生が促し、摩夜さんが立ち上がる。: At Dr. Mikanagi's urging, Maya-san stood up.
ぼくたちに頭を下げ、摩夜さんが出て行く。: After bowing to us, Maya-san left.
入れ替わりに辻村さんが入ってきた。: Tsujimura-san entered as she was leaving.
想子「気分が優れないようです」: Souko: "She doesn't seem to be feeling well."
辻村「地下室なども見て回りましたが……どこにも藍お嬢様はいらっしゃいませんでした: Tsujimura: "I've looked around the basement and other areas... but Miss Ai was nowhere to be found..."
智士「どこかまだ見ていない所はありませんか？」: Satoshi: "Is there anywhere we haven't looked yet?"
辻村「見ていない所と申しましても……お客様の部屋などは入れませんし……」: Tsujimura: "Even if you say that... I cannot enter the guests' rooms..."
想子「外へ出て行ったという可能性は？」: Souko: "Is there a possibility she went outside?"
想子さんの問いに辻村さんが首を振る。: Tsujimura-san shook his head at Souko-san's question.
辻村「玄関や勝手口に足跡は残っていませんでした。もっともまだ雪が降っていますから: Tsujimura: "There were no footprints at the front entrance or the back door. Though, since it's still snowing, any footprints might have been erased as time passed."
智士「ぼくが最後に藍さんに会ったのは十一時前でした。今だと二時間前……」: Satoshi: "The last time I saw Ai-san was just before eleven. That would be two hours ago now..."
紅緒「二時間では昨晩のような猛吹雪でない限り、足跡が完全に消える事はまずないだろ: Benio: "In two hours, unless it was a fierce blizzard like last night, footprints wouldn't completely disappear."
想子「そうなると、ほぼ確実に建物の中に居ると限られるわね……」: Souko: "If that's the case, then she's almost certainly still inside the building..."
と、ぼくは言葉を呑み込んだ。: And with that, I swallowed my words.
でも――これだけ探しても出て来ないと云う事は。: But—if she still hasn't turned up after all this searching.
紅緒「ああ。昨晩零時に鐘が鳴っただろう？ あの機械が置かれている部屋がある」: Benio: "Yes. Didn't the bell ring at midnight last night? There's a room where that machinery is kept."
想子「普段は正午にだけ鳴らしていると言っていたわね。……さっきは鳴ったかしら？」: Souko: "You said it usually only rings at noon. ...I wonder if it rang earlier?"
そういえば……ぼくは鐘の音を聴いただろうか？: Come to think of it... did I hear the sound of the bell?
紅緒「……あまり気にしていなかったな」: Benio: "...I didn't really pay much attention to it."
辻村「ええ……恥ずかしながら私も気にはしておりませんでした」: Tsujimura: "Yes... I'm ashamed to admit that I wasn't paying attention either."
想子「……そうね。辻村さん、案内をお願いします」: Souko: "...You're right. Tsujimura-san, please lead the way."
ぼくと想子さんは、辻村さんの後を追って広間を出た。: Souko-san and I followed behind Tsujimura-san as we left the hall.
階段を上がり、吹き抜け部分を囲む通路を進んでいく。: We went up the stairs and proceeded along the passage surrounding the atrium.
辻村「中に梯子があって、上の屋根裏部屋に通じています」: Tsujimura: "There's a ladder inside that leads to the attic room above."
ぼくが先頭に立ち、中に入る。: I took the lead and stepped inside.
目に入ったものが何であるかを頭が理解する前に扉をあけていた。: I had opened the door before my mind could even process what I was looking at.
つんとした血の臭いが漂っている。: A sharp smell of blood hung in the air.
床に斃れている、人の身体。: A human body, lying sprawled on the floor.
顔を顰めながら、想子さんが屋根裏部屋に入っていく。: Frowning, Souko-san entered the attic room.
想子「……来ている服は同じ。でも頭がないと……本人かどうかはわからない」: Souko: "...The clothes she's wearing are the same. But without a head... I can't be sure if it's really her."
智士「そんなの……他に誰が居るというんですか！？」: Satoshi: "What do you mean... who else could it possibly be!?"
想子「落ち着きなさい。……辻村さん、御巫先生を呼んできて貰えますか？」: Souko: "Calm down. ...Tsujimura-san, could you go call Dr. Mikanagi?"
辻村さんが立ち上がり、部屋を出る。: Tsujimura-san stood up and left the room.
想子「……私だってこれが藍さんだと思うわよ。でも……」: Souko: "...I think it's Ai-san too. But..."
ぼくも室内を見回す。: I also looked around the room.
決して広くはない天井部屋。: A small attic room that was by no means spacious.
見える範囲に、藍さんの頭部はなかった。: Within my field of vision, Ai-san's head was nowhere to be found.
智士「……六曜さんの時と同じ……ですか……？」: Satoshi: "...Is it the same... as with Rokuyou-san...?"
部屋の外から梯子を登る音が聞こえてきた。: I heard the sound of someone climbing the ladder from outside the room.
部屋に飛びこんできた御巫先生が息を吐いた。: Dr. Mikanagi, who had hurried into the room, let out a breath.
黙祷を捧げた後、想子さんが口を開く。: After we offered a silent prayer, Souko-san spoke up.
想子「……調べましょう。いつまでもこんな所に寝かせておくわけにもいきませんから」: Souko: "...Let's investigate. We can't just leave her lying here forever."
智士「……首を切った時に飛んだんでしょうね」: Satoshi: "...The blood must have sprayed when the neck was cut."
想子「でも……また頭部が無いわ」: Souko: "But... the head is missing again."
智士「持ち出したんでしょうか……」: Satoshi: "Did they take it with them...?"
想子「理由がわからないわ。この遺体が藍さん以外だったりしない限りは」: Souko: "I don't understand the reason. Unless this body belongs to someone other than Ai-san."
御巫「……藍さんで間違いないと思いますよ。彼女の診察もしていましたから見間違える: Mikanagi: "...I'm certain it's Ai-san. I've examined her before, so I wouldn't mistake her."
御巫「……頸部の切断からはさほど時間は経過していないようです。ただ……僅かに死斑: Mikanagi: "...It hasn't been very long since the neck was severed. However... I can see some slight livor mortis. Did someone move the body?"
智士「いえ……発見した時のままです」: Satoshi: "No... it's just as we found it."
御巫「死斑が脚の方に出ています。通常遺体の下になっている部分に鬱血して発生するの: Mikanagi: "The livor mortis is appearing toward the legs. Normally, it occurs as congestion in the parts of the body that are underneath, but it's not appearing on the arms... which are currently the lower part."
御巫「……恐らく何らかの方法で殺害した後、遺体を動かして頸部を切断したのでしょう: Mikanagi: "...They likely killed her using some other method first, then moved the body and severed the neck."
……首が切断された藍さんの遺体が横たわっている。: ...The beheaded body of Ai-san lies there.
床に白い花が一輪落ちていた。: A single white flower had fallen to the floor.
智士「六曜さんの時と同じでしょうか……？」: Satoshi: "Is it the same as with Rokuyou-san...?"
どうしてこんな所に……: Why would it be in a place like this...
御巫「……おそらくそれで頸部を切断したんだろうね。切断面も、勇と同じようになって: Mikanagi: "...They likely used that to sever the neck. The cut surface is just like the one on Isamu."
……六曜さんと同じ事が起こったようだ。: ...It seems the same thing that happened to Rokuyou-san has occurred.
シーツの一部が赤く染まる。: Part of the sheet was stained red.
あかねさんが人を呼びに行き、想子さんと御巫先生、それに辻村さんがやって来た。: Akane-san went to call people, and Souko-san, Dr. Mikanagi, and Tsujimura-san arrived.
目の前にいたのに、助ける事ができなかった。: She was right in front of me, but I couldn't save her.
悔やんでも悔やみきれない。: I'm filled with a regret I can't express.
ぼくがもう少し、まともな判断を下していれば。: If only I had made a more sound judgment.
そうすれば、藍さんは助かっただろうに。: If I had, Ai-san would still be alive.
……ぼくの目の前で、藍さんの首を絞めたロープだ。: ...This is the rope that strangled Ai-san right before my eyes.

ぼくはそっと扉の隙間から中を覗き込んだ。: I quietly peek inside through the gap in the door.
……想子さんが窓際でギターを抱えていた。: ......Souko-san is sitting by the window with a guitar.
想子さんがこちらを視線を向け、やや安堵したような息を洩らす。: Souko-san turns her gaze toward me and lets out a sigh of relief.
智士「……ひとりでこんな所にいると危ないですよ」: Satoshi: "......It's dangerous to be in a place like this all by yourself."
想子「わかってる。だから、明かりも小さくしていたんだけど……」: Souko: "I know. That's why I kept the lights dim, but......"
智士「廊下に光が洩れてましたよ。それに音も洩れていたら意味がありませんよ」: Satoshi: "Light was leaking into the hallway. And if the sound is leaking out too, there's no point."
想子さんが苦笑を洩らす。: Souko-san lets out a wry smile.
想子「……かもしれないわね。さすがにこうもいろいろとあるとね……」: Souko: "......I might be. With everything that's happened, it's only natural......"
指に巻かれた包帯の結び目に目がいった。: My eyes are drawn to the knot of the bandage wrapped around her finger.
想子「だからちょっとした気晴らしに弾いてたのよ」: Souko: "That's why I was playing a little to clear my head."
智士「もう少し聴かせて貰えませんか？」: Satoshi: "Could you let me hear a bit more?"
想子「……じゃあ別のをね」: Souko: "......Then I'll play a different one."
そう言って想子さんはギターを抱え直した。: Saying so, Souko-san adjusts her guitar.
鈴の音色が混じる。: The sound of a bell mingles in.
見れば黒猫が演奏室に入ってきていた。: I see the black cat has entered the music room.
控えめに鳴き、黒猫が入口の扉へ戻っていく。: Letting out a soft meow, the black cat heads back toward the door.
智士「紅緒さん……ラブを探していたんですか？」: Satoshi: "Benio-san...... were you looking for Love?"
黒猫は一声鳴くと、部屋の奥にあるピアノへと走っていった。: The black cat gives one meow and runs toward the piano at the back of the room.
紅緒「なんだ、弾いて欲しいのか？」: Benio: "What is it, do you want me to play?"
想子「じゃあ、合わせてみましょうか」: Souko: "Well then, shall we play together?"
想子さんの合図で、合奏が始まった。: At Souko-san's signal, they begin to play in unison.
ピアノとギターの音色が合わさる。: The sounds of the piano and guitar blend together.
初めて一緒に演奏しているだろうに、そういう感じは一切見受けられないほど見事だった: Even though this must be their first time playing together, it's so magnificent that it doesn't feel like it at all.
ピアノの近くで伏せている黒猫も気持ちよさそうに耳を傾けている。: The black cat, lying near the piano, is also listening contentedly.
寂しさよりも優しさを感じる音だった。: It's a sound that feels more like kindness than loneliness.
ふたりが顔を見合わせる。: The two of them look at each other.
こういう時、ぼくも楽器が弾ければなと思う。: At times like this, I wish I could play an instrument too.
邪魔をしないのが一番だろうけど。: Though I suppose not getting in the way is for the best.
もし、これに詩音さんの歌声が加わっていたら――: If only Shion-san's singing voice were added to this——
それは、とても素晴らしいセッションになっているだろう。: It would surely be a truly wonderful session.
扉の方から拍手が鳴った。: The sound of applause echoes from the door.
なるみ「すごいすごい、息ぴったりじゃない」: Narumi: "Incredible, incredible, you two are perfectly in sync."
なるみ「夕飯を持ってきたんだけど、お嬢様が部屋に居なかったから探してたのよ」: Narumi: "I brought dinner, but the young lady wasn't in her room, so I was looking for her."
紅緒「ああ、済まない。ラヴを探していたからな」: Benio: "Ah, sorry. I was looking for Love."
なるみ「はあっ……それで、食べるんですか？」: Narumi: "Haa...... well then, are you going to eat?"

想子「そっちまで気が回らなかったわね」: Souko: "I didn't even think about food."
なるみ「はいはい、全員分ありますからご心配なく」: Narumi: "Yes, yes, I've got enough for everyone, so don't worry."
なるみさんが廊下から台車を持ってくる。: Narumi-san brings a cart in from the hallway.
なるみ「おにぎりとお茶ですけど、ないよりましでしょ？」: Narumi: "It's just rice balls and tea, but better than nothing, right?"
床に敷物を敷いて車座になる。: We spread a mat on the floor and sit in a circle.

塩のきいたおにぎりを頬張る。: I stuff my mouth with a salty rice ball.

なるみ「だから心配ないって言ってるでしょうが」: Narumi: "I told you not to worry, didn't I?"

お茶を飲みながら想子さんは言う。: Souko-san says as she drinks her tea.

なるみ「そんなご飯が不味くなるような事話さないでよ」: Narumi: "Please don't talk about things that make the food taste bad."

辻村さんは画家だった筈だけど……: I thought Tsujimura-san was a painter......
紅緒「父上を含め、辻村家は音楽一家だったからな。父上の音楽は難しかったから、辻村: Benio: "Including my father, the Tsujimura family was a family of musicians, after all. My father's music was difficult, so it was easier to have Tsujimura teach me."
なるみ「旦那様のお書きになった譜面などは今でも高値で取引されてますからねえ」: Narumi: "The sheet music the master wrote still trades for high prices even today, after all."
紅緒「私なんぞ、見ても碌にひけやしないからな」: Benio: "I can't even play them properly just by looking at them."
想子「プロじゃないと無理でしょうね」: Souko: "It'd be impossible unless you're a professional."
ぼくにはまったく付いていけない話題が続いている。: The conversation continues with topics I can't follow at all.
智士「でも……恒星氏の遺産って、そんなにあるんですか？」: Satoshi: "But...... is Mr. Kousei's inheritance really that substantial?"
ぼくは気になっていた事を紅緒さんに訊いてみた。: I ask Benio-san what's been on my mind.
紅緒「あるんじゃないか？ 詳しい額面までは知らんが」: Benio: "I suppose it is? I don't know the exact amount, though."

紅緒「まあ、七月家から受け継ぐものに碌なものなどないのだが」: Benio: "Well, there's nothing good to be inherited from the Nanatsuki family anyway."

智士「紅緒さんだったら喜びそうですけど」: Satoshi: "I would have thought you'd be delighted by it, Benio-san."
紅緒「……『呪い』なんてものは、人が産み出しているんだ。摩訶不思議な事でもなんで: Benio: "......A 'curse' is something created by humans. It's nothing mysterious."
想子「悪くはないわ。『七憑きの呪い』と呼ばれているものが実際に起こっているのなら: Souko: "It's not a problem. If what is called the 'Curse of Seven Possessions' is actually happening, then there must be human intent behind it."
紅緒「そう云う事だな。それが今回の件にも絡んでいる可能性は高いだろう」: Benio: "Precisely. There's a high probability that it's involved in this incident as well."
なるみ「はあっ……いい加減にして貰いたいわ」: Narumi: "Haa...... I wish you'd just give it a rest."
なるみ「いいお金になるからここで働いてるのに、こんな事が起こっちゃ割に合わないわ: Narumi: "I'm only working here because the money is good, but if things like this happen, it's just not worth it."
紅緒「……そうだろうな。どんなに金が稼げても、死ねばそれまでだ」: Benio: "......I suppose so. No matter how much money you make, it doesn't matter if you're dead."

本当はもう少し話していたかったけど、ぼくは想子さんに従って立ち上がる。: I really wanted to talk a little more, but I follow Souko-san and stand up.
想子「今晩は出来る限り部屋に篭もっている方がいいでしょうね」: Souko: "It's likely best to stay in our rooms tonight as much as possible."
紅緒「だろうな。とはいえ強制も出来ん。どうしても出歩く奴は居るだろうからな」: Benio: "I suppose so. Though we can't force anyone. There are bound to be those who wander about no matter what."
そう言って紅緒さんはぼくをじっと見つめてきた。: Saying so, Benio-san stares intently at me.
紅緒「今日は随分と動き回っていただろう？ 今晩もそうするような気がしてな」: Benio: "You were moving around quite a lot today, weren't you? I just had a feeling you'd do the same tonight."
智士「……じっとしていても、何も解決しないような気がするんですよ」: Satoshi: "......I just feel like staying still won't solve anything."
部屋の明かりが消えた後も、じっと待ち続けた。: Even after the lights in the room went out, I continued to wait perfectly still.
やがて彼に連れられた彼女が部屋に戻ってきた。: Eventually, she returned to the room, accompanied by him.
やはり彼は思ったとおりに行動してくれている。: He was acting exactly as I had anticipated.
彼女が部屋の扉の鍵を掛ける。: She locked the door to the room.
見られても構わなかった。: I didn't care if I was seen.
一度失敗している以上、今度は確実に仕留めなくてはならなかった。: Since I'd already failed once, I had to ensure I finished the job this time.
昏倒した彼女の身体を引き摺っていく。: I dragged her unconscious body away.
浴槽に彼女の身体を入れ、首に紐を巻き付けて絞めつける。: I placed her body in the bathtub and wound a cord around her neck, tightening it.
一瞬覚醒したかのような反応を見せた彼女だったが、すぐに動かなくなった。: She showed a brief reaction as if waking for a split second, but soon ceased moving altogether.
念の為に猿轡を噛ませ、湯船に水を溜めていく。: Just to be safe, I gagged her and began filling the tub with water.
鋸を取り出し、彼女の頸部、索痕の下にあてる。: I took out the saw and placed it against her neck, just below the ligature mark.
溜まり始めた水がすぐに赤く染まっていく。: The pooling water was instantly stained red.
一滴も返り血を浴びぬよう、服は脱いでいた。: I had stripped naked to ensure not a single drop of back-spray would get on my clothes.
もし身体に血が付いてしまっても、すぐに洗い流せる。: Even if blood got on my body, I could wash it off immediately.
彼女はやはり窒息で死んでいるようだった。: She seemed to have died from suffocation after all.
頸椎が削られても、もう反応は見せなかった。: Even as the cervical vertebrae were sawn through, she showed no further reaction.
切断を終えた頭部を布でくるみ、窓を開けて遠くへ放り投げる。: I wrapped the severed head in a cloth, opened the window, and hurled it far away.
吹雪の所為でよくは見えなかったが、血が垂れる事もなかったようだ。: I couldn't see well because of the blizzard, but it didn't look like any blood had dripped.
その後ベッド脇のランプのスイッチを入れ、まだ電気が来ていないことを確認すると、コ: After that, I switched on the lamp by the bed to confirm the power hadn't returned, then tore the cord off and dropped the end into the water-filled tub.
あまり意味のある行為とは言えないけれど、彼らならば必ず何らかの意味を見出してくれ: I couldn't say it was a particularly meaningful act, but I was sure they would find some sort of meaning in it.
もう一度停電を起こす事も出来る。: I could trigger another blackout if needed.
そうすれば――自然な形で不在証明を作る事もできる。: That way——I could establish an alibi in a natural fashion.
さて――部屋に戻ろう。: $ Now then——time to return to my room.
智士「あ、藍さんでしたら部屋に居る筈です」: Satoshi: "Ah, Ai-san should be in her room."
紅緒「ふむ……そうか。では確認しに行こう」: Benio: "Hmm...... I see. Then let's go check."
ぼくは頷くと紅緒さんと共に階段を上っていった。: I nodded and headed up the stairs with Benio-san.
二階に上がり、藍さんの部屋の前へ。: We went up to the second floor and stood before Ai-san's room.
紅緒「姉上、私だ。開けてくれないか？」: Benio: "Sister, it's me. Could you open up?"
紅緒さんが呼びかけるが、中からの反応はない。: Benio-san called out, but there was no response from inside.
先程はしっかりと鍵を掛けたのを確認している。: I'd confirmed that she'd locked the door firmly earlier.
紅緒さんが踵を返し、部屋の外へ出ようとして立ち止まった。: Benio-san turned on her heel to leave the room, then stopped.
黒猫が紅緒さんの足の間をすり抜けて部屋の中へ入ってきた。: The black cat slipped between Benio-san's legs and ran into the room.
紅緒「どこへ行くつもりだ？ そっちは浴室――！？」: Benio: "Where are you going? That's the bathroom——!?"
視線は壁。: Her gaze was fixed on the wall.
壁にあるコンセントから伸びた電線が浴室へ向かっている。: An electric cord extending from an outlet on the wall led toward the bathroom.
ぼくたちは先を争うように浴室へ急いだ。: We rushed to the bathroom, almost competing to get there first.
黒猫が付けている鈴の音が浴室に響く。: The sound of the bell on the black cat's collar echoed in the bathroom.
首のない遺体が真っ赤に染まった浴槽の湯の中に浮かんでいた。: A headless corpse was floating in the blood-red water of the bathtub.
部屋から伸びていた電線は湯船の中に浸かっていた。: The electric cord stretching from the room was submerged in the tub.
ぼくは藍さんの身体に向かって手を伸ばす。: I reached my hand out toward Ai-san's body.
紅緒「……動かさない方がいい」: Benio: "......It's better not to move her."
硬い表情で呟く。: She murmured with a stiff expression.

ぼくは震える手で水に浸かっている電線を引き上げた。: With trembling hands, I pulled the submerged electric cord out of the water.
ぼくらは藍さんの遺体に黙祷を捧げ、この部屋を後にした。: We offered a silent prayer for Ai-san's body and left the room behind.
沈痛な面持ちでホールに戻ってきた。: With somber expressions, we returned to the hall.
想子さんと御巫先生が残っていた。: Souko-san and Dr. Mikanagi were still there.
が、ぼくの顔を見て動きを止めた。: But she stopped when she saw my face.
御巫先生も奇妙な空気に気付いたようだ。: Dr. Mikanagi seemed to have sensed the strange atmosphere as well.
紅緒「……私は母上たちに伝えてくる」: Benio: "......I'm going to tell Mother and the others."
振り返りもせず、紅緒さんがホールを出て行く。: Without looking back, Benio-san left the hall.
想子「……私たちも行きましょう。藍さんの部屋でいいのね？」: Souko: "......Let's go too. It's Ai-san's room, right?"
……藍さんがどんな状態になっているかを説明出来ないまま、ぼくは想子さんたちの後を: ......Unable to explain the state Ai-san was in, I simply followed behind Souko-san and the others as they headed up the stairs.
藍さんの部屋の前まで来たとき、廊下の明かりが灯った。: Just as we reached the front of Ai-san's room, the hallway lights flickered on.

ぼくは想子さんたちの会話を遮るようにそう言って、藍さんの部屋の中へ足を踏み入れた: I said this as if to cut off Souko-san and the Doctor's conversation, then stepped into Ai-san's room.
想子「……電線が浴室へ引き込まれている」: Souko: "......An electric cord has been pulled into the bathroom."
想子さんが壁のコンセントから伸びる電線を見つけた。: Souko-san found the cord stretching from the wall outlet.
智士「……見つけた時は湯船に浸かっていました」: Satoshi: "......It was submerged in the tub when I found it."
想子さんはぼくの肩を軽く叩き、浴室へ入っていった。: Souko-san tapped my shoulder lightly and entered the bathroom.
御巫先生が沈痛な面持ちで藍さんに黙祷を捧げている。: Dr. Mikanagi offered a silent prayer to Ai-san with a somber face.
御巫「すぐにでも引き上げてやりたいけれど……ここを調べる方が先だろうね」: Mikanagi: "I want to pull her out immediately, but...... investigating here should come first."
想子「しっかりしなさい、ここを調べるわよ」: Souko: "Pull yourself together, we're going to investigate here."
想子さんに背中を叩かれ、ぼくはのろのろと動き始めた。: Souko-san slapped my back, and I began to move sluggishly.
室内へ戻る扉だ。: It's the door leading back into the room.
床とのわずかな隙間から、電気のコードが入ってきている。: An electric cord is coming in through the slight gap between the door and the floor.
扉自体には、特に問題はないと思う。: I don't think there's any particular problem with the door itself.
壁に掛けられているタオルに、紙切れのような小さなゴミが張り付いていた。: On a towel hanging on the wall, a small piece of trash like a scrap of paper was stuck.
タオルに返り血などは付着していないようだ。: There doesn't seem to be any back-spray from the blood on the towel.
智士「これが漏電の原因でしょうか……」: Satoshi: "Was this the cause of the short circuit......?"
浴槽に浸けられていた電源コードが漏電の原因のようだ。: It seems the power cord submerged in the tub was the cause of the short circuit.
真っ赤に染まった浴槽の中に白い花が一輪浮かんでいた。: A single white flower was floating in the blood-red bathtub.
浴槽にスノードロップの花が浮いている。: A snowdrop flower is floating in the tub.
御巫「……検視は引き上げてからにしましょう」: Mikanagi: "......Let's wait until after we've pulled her out to perform the autopsy."
……遺体の検分は後にしよう。: ......I'll leave the examination of the body for later.
御巫「では……引き上げましょう」: Mikanagi: "Well then...... let's pull her out."
浴槽から水を抜き、藍さんの遺体を御巫先生とふたりで抱え上げる。: We drained the water from the tub, and Dr. Mikanagi and I lifted Ai-san's body out together.
想子「……死因などを調べて貰えますか？」: Souko: "......Could you investigate the cause of death and such?"
御巫「ええ……しかし、あまりはっきりした事はわからないかもしれません」: Mikanagi: "Yes...... however, I might not be able to determine anything very clearly."
御巫先生が遺体の検分を始めた。: Dr. Mikanagi began his examination of the body.
御巫「頭部が残っていればはっきりとするんでしょうが……」: Mikanagi: "If the head were still here, it would be clearer, but......"

御巫「感電と頸部切断、どちらが先かわからないんですよ」: Mikanagi: "I can't tell which came first: the electrocution or the decapitation."

御巫「感電で死亡、或いは意識不明になった所で首を切断した、と考えた方が無難です」: Mikanagi: "It's safer to assume she was decapitated after being killed by electrocution, or at least after falling unconscious from it."

智士「そんなの――気にするに決まってるでしょう！？ ぼくだって大切な人を失いたく: Satoshi: "How could I not—of course I'm going to care!? I don't want to lose someone precious to me either!!"
智士「……想子さんだって、大切な人が死んでしまった時の痛みは知っている筈です。だ: Satoshi: "...Souko-san, you of all people should know the pain of losing someone precious. So you must understand the pain I'll have to carry after this, right?"
ぼくは泣きながら想子さんに訴えかけた。: I pleaded with Souko-san through my tears.
智士「だからっ……それを忘れてしまったのだったら、もう、ぼくには止められません」: Satoshi: "So... if you've truly forgotten that, then there's nothing more I can do to stop you."
智士「そうですよね……忘れていたのだったら、復讐なんて考えもしませんよね……？」: Satoshi: "That's it, isn't it...? If you'd forgotten, you wouldn't even be thinking about revenge... right...?"
智士「忘れていないのでしたら……もう少しだけ、ぼくの話を聞いてください……」: Satoshi: "If you haven't forgotten... please, just listen to me for a little longer..."
想子「……そんなもの見せられても……」: Souko: "...Even if you show me something like that..."
想子「やっぱり……きみには何もできない」: Souko: "I knew it... there's nothing you can do."
崖の下にふたりの姿が消えた。: The two figures vanished below the cliff.
ぼくは……どうしようもない選択をしてしまった……: I... I made the most helpless choice possible...
智士「そうです。恒星さんが遺したものです。表紙には『親愛なるマリノへ捧ぐ』と書か: Satoshi: "Yes. It's something Kousei-san left behind. On the cover, it says 'Dedicated to my dear Marino'."
紅緒さんがぼくの横から楽譜を覗き込む。: Benio-san peered at the music from beside me.
紅緒「ふむ……父上の未発表曲のようだな。ん？ これは……」: Benio: "Hmm... it seems to be one of Father's unpublished pieces. Wait, what's this...?"
紅緒さんは楽譜の片隅を指差す。: Benio-san pointed to a corner of the sheet music.
智士「……『そして歌音と詩音へ。親愛なる娘たちに遺す』」: Satoshi: "...'And to Kanon and Shion. I leave this to my beloved daughters'."
智士「……詩音さん、あの歌を……唄っていただけますか？」: Satoshi: "...Shion-san, could you... sing that song?"
ぼくの予想通りなら、この楽譜の曲は――: If my hunch was right, the melody in this music was—
詩音さんの歌声が雪原に響く。: Shion-san's singing voice echoed across the snowy field.
智士「やっぱり……想子さんのギターを聴いたときに、少しだけ似ているかもと思ったん: Satoshi: "I thought so... when I heard you play the guitar, I felt like it was slightly familiar..."
智士「想子さん……気付いていたんでしょう？ 詩音さんが妹だと」: Satoshi: "Souko-san... you realized it, didn't you? That Shion-san is your sister."
想子「何も……覚えてないの……私は……ただ、七月歌音とだけ……」: Souko: "I don't... remember anything... All I have is the name Nanatsuki Kanon..."
智士「……想子さんだったら名前の響きだけで気付いたと思うんです。でも……認めたく: Satoshi: "...I think someone like you would have realized it just from the sound of her name. But... did you just not want to admit it?"
涙を流し、想子さんが叫ぶ。: Tears streaming down her face, Souko-san screamed.
しかしその声は真っ白な雪に吸い込まれていく。: But her voice was swallowed up by the pure white snow.
智士「……恒星さんの手記によれば、歌音さんは助け出された後も意識は無かったそうで: Satoshi: "...According to Kousei-san's journal, Kanon-san remained unconscious even after she was rescued. And Shion-san had lost all of her memories—"
想子「だって……私は、その子……詩音も殺そうと思っていたのよ……？」: Souko: "But... I was planning to kill her too... Shion...?"
離れた摩夜さんの所へ御巫先生と辻村さんが近付いていった。: Dr. Mikanagi and Tsujimura-san went over to Maya-san, who was some distance away.
詩音さんを守ろうと動いた高嶺さんをぼくは制した。: I stopped Takamine-san as he moved to protect Shion-san.
智士「心配……ないと思います」: Satoshi: "I think... there's no need to worry."
智士「高嶺さん……あなたも、ふたりを守りたいんですよね……？ だったら、想子さん: Satoshi: "Takamine-san... you want to protect them both too, don't you...? Then please, protect Souko-san—Kanon-san—as well."
そうしている間にも、想子さんは詩音さんの元まで辿り着いた。: While this was happening, Souko-san reached Shion-san's side.
想子さんの顔に暗い影は見られない。: There was no longer a dark shadow on Souko-san's face.
穏やかな表情でふたりは見つめ合っている。: The two of them gazed at each other with peaceful expressions.
長かった夜が明ける――: The long night was finally over—
数日ぶりの太陽の光がふたりを包み込む。: For the first time in days, sunlight enveloped them.
詩音さんは微笑み、両手を差し伸べた。: Shion-san smiled and reached out both hands.
朝日がふたりを照らす。: The morning sun shone down on them.
積もった雪に光が反射し、きらきらと輝いて見えた。: The light reflected off the deep snow, making everything look like it was sparkling.
この三日間の出来事などまるで何もなかったかのように、あたりにはスノードロップの群: As if the events of the last three days had never happened, the fields were filled with blooming snowdrops.
やがて雪も解け、一面萌ゆる若葉で埋め尽くされるだろう。: Soon the snow would melt, and the area would be covered in lush green leaves.
かつてエデンを追放されたアダムとイヴのもとを訪れた天使が、ふたりに春と云うあたた: Just as the angel who visited Adam and Eve after their exile from Eden gave them the warm hope of spring—
春は待ち続ければ必ずやってくるのだ。: If you wait long enough, spring always comes.
亡くなった恒星氏やマリノさんも、このふたりを遠くの地から優しく見守ってくれている: The late Mr. Kousei and Marino-san are surely watching over them both with kindness from afar.
ここに居る皆も、ただ黙ってじっと彼女たちを見守っている。: Everyone here is simply watching them in silence.
想子さんはもう大丈夫だろう。: Souko-san will be all right now.
ぼくが尊敬している想子さんが、そこに戻ってきているのがわかるから。: I can tell that the Souko-san I respect has returned.
確かに、想子さんと詩音さんの罪は決して赦されるものではない。: True, the crimes of Souko-san and Shion-san can never truly be forgiven.
時が過ぎ、その償いを終えた後には――: When time has passed and they have finished making amends—
透明だった雪に自らの色を与えたスノードロップのように、人の為に生きていけるだろう: Like the snowdrops that give their own color to the transparent snow, they will be able to live for the sake of others.
それを皆が望んでいるだろうから――: Because that's surely what everyone wishes for—
あたりはすっかり明るくなっていた。: The world around us was now fully bright.
紅緒さんが足許に姿を見せていた小さな花に視線を落とした。: Benio-san looked down at a small flower peeking out from beneath her feet.
紅緒「スノードロップの花言葉を覚えているか？」: Benio: "Do you remember the language of flowers for the snowdrop?"
紅緒「……人を殺めた彼女らに、希望はあると思うか？」: Benio: "...Do you think there's hope for people like them, who have taken lives?"
智士「そんなの当然じゃないですか。冬は――もう終わったんですよ」: Satoshi: "Isn't that obvious? Winter... is finally over."
詩音「私が……六曜様を殺しました」: Shion: "I... I was the one who killed Rokuyou-sama."
その告白に室内がざわめいた。: The room erupted into whispers at her confession.

紅緒さんがぼくに問い掛けてきた。: Benio-san directed her question at me.

詩音「藍お姉様……こうするしか、なかったのです……」: Shion: "Ai-oneesama... it was the only thing I could do..."
藍さんが詩音さんに縋り付いて泣き叫ぶ。: Ai-san clung to Shion-san, wailing and crying.
御巫「詩音さん……きみは、僕たちを騙していたのかい……？」: Mikanagi: "Shion-san... have you been deceiving us all this time...?"
摩夜「それでも、隠していたのは事実でしょうに……」: Maya: "And yet, it is a fact that you were hiding it..."
詩音さんは目に涙を溜めて頭を下げる。: Shion-san bowed her head, her eyes filling with tears.
それだけは言いたくないのだろうか――: It seemed she didn't want to talk about that part—
智士「……結婚式の夜中、六曜さんに襲われたそうです。抵抗して、とっさに殺してしま: Satoshi: "...She says he attacked her in the middle of the night on the day of the wedding. She resisted, and killed him in the heat of the moment—"
ぼくの助け船に、想子さんは何も言わなかった。: Souko-san said nothing in response to my attempt to help.
恐らく想子さんは気付いている。: She probably realized what was going on.
今も辻村さんの様子を窺っているようだ。: She seemed to be watching Tsujimura-san's reaction.

それは辻村さんの事だろうか――？: Could she be talking about Tsujimura-san—?

さすがに御巫先生にも詳しい死因はわからなかった。: As expected, even Dr. Mikanagi couldn't determine the exact cause of death.
胴体と一緒にしてあげたかったけれど、溶けてしまうと更なる問題が発生するかもしれな: I wanted to reunite it with the body, but worried that more problems might arise if it melted, so we decided to bury it somewhere easy to find.
ここへ来てから四日目の朝、予定通りに麓からやって来た御者が壊された吊り橋を発見し: On the morning of the fourth day after our arrival, the driver coming from the foot of the mountain discovered the destroyed suspension bridge as scheduled.
その対岸まで様子を見に行っていた紅緒さんが話を付け、麓へ戻った御者が警官と何人か: Benio-san, who had gone to check the opposite bank, spoke with him, and the driver returned to the base and brought back police and several laborers a little after noon.
そこから急いで足場を組み、何とか人ひとり渡れる橋を架けて警官が渡ってきた頃にはも: They hurriedly constructed scaffolding, and by the time they had managed to put up a bridge that a single person could cross and the police had made their way over, it was already evening.
警官「どういたしましょうか、奥様……」: Police Officer: "How shall we proceed, Madam...?"
摩夜「……七月家の娘とはいえ、罪を犯したのは事実です。厳正なる裁きをお願いいたし: Maya: "...Even if she is a daughter of the Nanatsuki family, the fact remains that she committed a crime. I ask that you judge her strictly according to the law."

智士「随分と警官の腰が低いですね……」: Satoshi: "The police are being awfully subservient..."

想子さんはまだ栓を開けていないコーラを紅緒さんに手渡した。: Souko-san handed Benio-san a bottle of cola that hadn't been opened yet.

いや、意外だったからこそ驚いてるのだけど。: Well, I was surprised, which is why I looked like that.
紅緒「ありがとう。大切に飲むことにしよう」: Benio: "Thank you. I'll be sure to savor it."

玄関から外へ出ようとしたとき、藍さんが詩音さんに駆け寄ってきた。: As we were about to head out the front door, Ai-san ran up to Shion-san.
まるで姉妹の順序が入れ替わったような光景だった。: It was a scene that made it look like the order of the sisters had been reversed.
紅緒「……姉上は詩音を愛しているからな」: Benio: "...My sister loves Shion, after all."
紅緒「心配せずとも、すぐに戻ってくるさ。……そうだろう？」: Benio: "Don't worry, she'll be back soon. ...Right?"
警官が直立不動で返答する。: The officer replied while standing at attention.
藍「詩音……どうか気をつけて」: Ai: "Shion... please take care of yourself."
外は雪が完全にやんでいた。: Outside, the snow had completely stopped.
想子「橋を渡った所に車が来ているそうよ」: Souko: "They said there's a vehicle waiting on the other side of the bridge."
想子「資材を運んできた四輪駆動のトラックがあるそうよ」: Souko: "Apparently there's a four-wheel-drive truck that brought the materials."
智士「まあ、戻れるんでしたらこの際何でもいいですよ」: Satoshi: "Well, as long as we can get back, anything is fine at this point."
想子「そういうこと。じゃ、帰りましょうか」: Souko: "Exactly. Well then, shall we head home?"
……と言うか、ホールで目が醒めた。: ...Or rather, I woke up in the hall.
身体の芯から冷え切っていた。: I was chilled to the bone.
そりゃそうか……こんな所で寝てしまったんだから。: I guess that's what happens when you sleep in a place like this.
いつ頃から寝ていたのだろう。: I wonder how long I was out.
何度も館内を巡回したから、明け方少し前なのだろうけど……: I'd done so many rounds of the mansion, so it must have been shortly before dawn...
身体を起こし、固まっていた筋肉をほぐす。: I sat up and stretched my stiff muscles.
あとで御巫先生に風邪薬でも貰っておいた方がいいかもしれない。: I should probably ask Dr. Mikanagi for some cold medicine later.
声に振り向くと、西側の廊下から詩音さんが出てきた所だった。: Turning toward the voice, I saw Shion-san coming out of the western corridor.
詩音さんが頭を下げ、そそくさと東側の廊下へ消えていく。: Shion-san bowed and hurried off into the eastern corridor.
……さすがに床に座り込んでいる奇妙な奴は避けられるか。: ...I guess it's only natural to want to avoid a weirdo sitting on the floor.
立ち上がってのびをした時、ホールに辻村さんが入ってきた。: As I stood up and stretched, Tsujimura-san entered the hall.

智士「紅緒さん……？ いえ、今朝はまだ見てませんが」: Satoshi: "Benio-san...? No, I haven't seen her yet this morning."

そう言って辻村さんをそこに残し、階段を上っていく。: Leaving Tsujimura-san there, I headed up the stairs.
二階の西側の廊下へ。: To the western corridor on the second floor.
夜通し館内を巡回していたから問題ないとは思うけど、それでも一抹の不安はあった。: I'd been making rounds all night, so I thought it would be fine, but a sliver of anxiety remained nonetheless.
何度も叩くが反応がない。: I knocked several times, but still no answer.
紅緒「やかましいぞさっきからっ！」: Benio: "You've been noisy for a while now!"
頭を押さえて蹲るぼくに、紅緒さんは不思議そうに声を掛けてくる。: Benio-san spoke to me with a puzzled look as I crouched down, clutching my head.

智士「だって、そうしないと紅緒さん起きないじゃないですか……」: Satoshi: "But if I wasn't, you wouldn't wake up, Benio-san..."

紅緒「ふん……まあ夜通し館の中を彷徨いていた莫迦者が居たようだから、心配は要らん: Benio: "Hmph... well, with an idiot wandering around the mansion all night, I suppose there's no need for concern."
紅緒「当たり前だ。あれだけ頻繁に行き来していれば誰だって気付く。犯人だと思われな: Benio: "Of course. Anyone would notice someone moving back and forth that frequently. You should be grateful you weren't mistaken for the killer."
紅緒「……そこまでする義理もないだろうに」: Benio: "...You really didn't have any obligation to go that far."
智士「でも、これ以上犠牲は出したくないですから」: Satoshi: "But I didn't want any more victims."
紅緒さんは小さく頷くと、廊下を歩き出した。: Benio-san gave a small nod and started walking down the hall.
紅緒「広間へ行くぞ。恐らく全員出てくるだろうからな」: Benio: "I'm heading to the hall. Everyone will likely be gathering there."
智士「ええ……でもその前に着替えてきてくださいね」: Satoshi: "Yes... but please go change first."
さすがに寝間着のまま行かせる訳にはいかないので、ぼくは紅緒さんを部屋に押し戻した: I couldn't exactly let her go in her sleepwear, so I pushed Benio-san back into her room.
着替えてきた紅緒さんと大広間に入ると、ソファに腰を下ろしていた藍さんが顔を上げた: When I entered the main hall with the now-changed Benio-san, Ai-san, who was sitting on the sofa, looked up.

あかね「あ、そうそう。切原様が探していらっしゃいましたよ」: Akane: "Oh, that's right. Kirihara-sama was looking for you."
姿が見えなかったから心配してくれていたのだろうか。: I wonder if she was worried since I'd disappeared.
あかね「まだ食堂に居られますけど……」: Akane: "She's still in the dining room..."
食堂を覗き込むと、想子さんが椅子に座ってコーラを飲んでいた。: When I peered into the dining room, Souko-san was sitting in a chair, drinking cola.
想子「あ、いた。どこ行ってたの？」: Souko: "Ah, there you are. Where have you been?"
智士「どこ行ってたのじゃありませんよ。大変だったんですから」: Satoshi: "Don't 'where have you been' me. It was a disaster."
ぼくは簡潔に地下室に閉じこめられた事を想子さんに話した。: I briefly explained to Souko-san that we'd been trapped in the basement.
想子「そんな事があったの……」: Souko: "To think something like that happened..."
智士「その間に犯人が何かしてるかもしれません。まずは全員の無事を確認しようと思い: Satoshi: "The culprit might have been doing something while we were trapped. I thought I should confirm everyone's safety first..."
想子「その方がいいわね。じゃあきみは二階の人たちを見てきてくれる？」: Souko: "That's a good idea. Then could you go check on the people on the second floor?"
あかね「あ、わたしは御巫先生の様子を見てきます」: Akane: "Ah, I'll go check on Dr. Mikanagi."
あかねさんはそう言うと、ぼくらが何かを言う前に食堂を飛び出して行ってしまった。: With that, Akane-san rushed out of the dining room before we could say anything.
智士「……じゃあぼくは、紅緒さんたちの所へ行ってみます」: Satoshi: "...Then I'll go check on Benio-san and the others."
想子「ええ、よろしくね。私は一階を見てくるわ」: Souko: "Right, please do. I'll check the first floor."
想子さんは空になったコーラの瓶をテーブルの上に置いて立ち上がった。: Souko-san placed her empty cola bottle on the table and stood up.
ホールまで出てくると、ちょうど反対側の廊下から来た紅緒さんと遭遇した。: When I reached the hall, I ran into Benio-san coming from the corridor on the opposite side.
智士「いえ、みんなの無事を確認しようと思ったんですが……」: Satoshi: "Nothing, I just thought I should check to make sure everyone is safe..."
ぼくは簡単に地下へ閉じこめられた事を話した。: I briefly explained that I'd been locked in the basement.
紅緒「ふむ……確かにそれは問題だな。何かされていてもおかしくはないが……」: Benio: "Hmm... that is certainly a problem. It wouldn't be surprising if someone was up to something..."

智士「そうですか。じゃあ二階へ行って摩夜さんたちの様子を見てきます」: Satoshi: "I see. Then I'll go upstairs and check on Maya-san and the others."
ぼくと紅緒さんは一緒に階段を上っていった。: Benio-san and I climbed the stairs together.
廊下の一番奥の摩夜さんの部屋。: We reached Maya-san's room at the very end of the corridor.
扉が開き、疲れた様子の摩夜さんが顔を出した。: The door opened, and a tired-looking Maya-san peered out.
紅緒「母上、しばらくの間部屋でじっとしていて下さい」: Benio: "Mother, please stay in your room for a while."
訝しげな表情を浮かべながらも、摩夜さんは部屋に戻って扉を閉めた。: Though she looked suspicious, Maya-san returned to her room and closed the door.
紅緒「余計な事は聞かせたくない」: Benio: "I don't want her hearing anything unnecessary."
藍さんの部屋の前に来て扉を叩く。: I reached Ai-san's room and knocked.
ぼくは藍さんにも詳細を伏せておく事にした。: I decided to keep the details hidden from Ai-san as well.

藍さんが部屋に戻っていった。: Ai-san went back into her room.
廊下の向こうから想子さんがやってきた。: Souko-san approached from the other end of the corridor.

想子「ええ、わかったわ。きみはどうするの？」: Souko: "Sure, I understand. What about you?"
智士「ぼくは食堂に戻ります。あかねさんにも聞かないといけませんし」: Satoshi: "I'm going back to the dining room. I need to talk to Akane-san too."
紅緒「そうか。じゃあ後で飯を持ってきてくれ」: Benio: "I see. Bring some food by later, then."
食堂に戻ると、なるみさんがキャベツを食べていた。: When I returned to the dining room, Narumi-san was eating cabbage.
智士「いや……まあ、いただきますけど」: Satoshi: "No... well, actually, I'll take some."
刻んで塩を振っただけのキャベツ。: It was just chopped cabbage with salt.
煌びやかな食堂には似合わないものだったけれど、今は食べられるだけありがたかった。: It didn't suit the glittering dining room at all, but right now, I was grateful just to have something to eat.

あかねさんは御巫先生の様子を見に行ったのだから、ぼくの部屋がある北側に居る筈だ。: Akane-san went to check on Dr. Mikanagi, so she should be on the north side where my room is.
廊下を歩いている時だった。: It was while I was walking down the corridor.
音のした方――東側の廊下に視線を向ける。: I turned my gaze toward the sound—the eastern corridor.
廊下の奥。: At the end of the hall.
演奏室の扉が開いていた。: The door to the performance room was open.
紅緒さんが床に倒れているのが見え、ぼくはすぐに駆け出していた。: I saw Benio-san collapsed on the floor and immediately started running.
倒れていた紅緒さんがしかめ面をしながら薄目を開けた。: The fallen Benio-san grimaced and opened her eyes slightly.
紅緒「……大丈夫な訳あるか、莫迦者……」: Benio: "...Of course I'm not okay, you idiot..."
紅緒さんは手を頭の後ろへやった。: Benio-san reached for the back of her head.
紅緒「糞っ……後ろから殴られたようだ……」: Benio: "Dammit... feels like I was hit from behind..."
智士「じっとしていて下さい。今御巫先生を呼んできますから――」: Satoshi: "Please stay still. I'll go get Dr. Mikanagi—"
ぐい、と紅緒さんに袖を引っ張られた。: Benio-san tugged hard on my sleeve.

ぼくはあたりに注意を払いながら訊ねる。: I asked while keeping an eye on our surroundings.
演奏室に人影はなかった。: There was no sign of anyone in the performance room.
ただ舞台上にグランドピアノが置かれているだけだ。: Just a grand piano sitting on the stage.
紅緒さんがぼくの手に何かを握らせた。: Benio-san pressed something into my hand.
あかねさんが開いたままの扉から部屋に飛びこんできた。: Akane-san burst into the room through the open door.
慌ただしく入ってきた扉から出て行く。: She dashed back out through the door she'd just entered.
入れ替わりに想子さんが入ってきた。: Souko-san entered as if taking her place.

意識が朦朧としつつあるようだ。: She seemed to be drifting in and out of consciousness.
ちょうどそこへ御巫先生を連れたあかねさんが戻ってきた。: Just then, Akane-san returned with Dr. Mikanagi.

紅緒さんの後頭部を氷嚢で冷やす。: He applied an ice pack to the back of Benio-san's head.
智士「いいえ……ぼくが見たのは紅緒さんが倒れたすぐの所です。すぐに駆けつけたんで: Satoshi: "No... I only saw Benio-san right after she fell. I rushed over immediately... but the culprit wasn't there."
想子「隠れられるとするなら――」: Souko: "If they were going to hide—"
想子さんが頭を巡らし、ふたつの扉を指で示した。: Souko-san looked around and pointed at two doors.

想子「……開けてみましょう。きみはそっち」: Souko: "...Let's check. You take that one."
想子さんが楽譜の置かれた部屋に通じる扉を指す。: Souko-san pointed to the door leading to the sheet music room.
ドアノブを掴み、唾を飲み込む。: I grabbed the doorknob and swallowed hard.
一応注意深く物陰も見て回るが、とても人の隠れられる隙間は無かった。: I checked behind everything just in case, but there was nowhere for a person to hide.
ちょうど向かいの扉からも想子さんが出てきた。: Souko-san emerged from the opposite door at the same time.
想子「こっちにも居なかったわ。何時の間に逃げ出したのかしら……」: Souko: "Nothing on this side either. When on earth did they slip away...?"
演奏室の中で倒れている紅緒さんが居る。: Benio-san was still lying in the performance room.

戻ってきてぼくは窓辺に近付いた。: I went back inside and approached the window.
雪は弱まっているので外がなんとか窺える。: The snow had weakened, so I could just barely see outside.

考えていても埒があかない。: Overthinking wasn't going to get us anywhere.
今は、素直に紅緒さんが無事だった事を喜ぼう。: For now, I should just be glad Benio-san is safe.

ぼくらにはここでやるべき事がある。: We had work to do here.

さっき紅緒さんに渡されたものがあった。: There was the thing Benio-san had handed me earlier.
ズボンのポケットに入れていたそれを引っ張り出す。: I pulled it out of my pants pocket.

藍さんの部屋で見付かったメモと同じ――？: The same as the memo found in Ai-san's room—?
ひっくり返してもそれしかない。: There was nothing else, even on the back.

ちゃんと気をつけろと言っていたのに。: Even though I'd told her to be careful.
ぼくに一言でも相談してくれていれば――: If she had consulted me for even a second—
想子「……過ぎてしまった事を悔やんでも仕方ないわ」: Souko: "...There's no use regretting what's already done."
想子さんがぼくの肩に手を置いた。: Souko-san placed a hand on my shoulder.
想子「あと、さっき言っていた凶器だけど――」: Souko: "Also, about the weapon you mentioned earlier—"
と、想子さんは空になったコーラの瓶をハンカチにくるんで差し出してきた。: Souko-san pulled out an empty cola bottle wrapped in a handkerchief and held it out.

ぼくは注意深く瓶の表面を見つめた。: I carefully examined the surface of the bottle.
光に照らしたり、角度を変えたりして見てみるが、指紋のような汚れは見当たらない。: I looked at it under the light, changing the angle, but I couldn't see any fingerprint smudges.
智士「……拭き取られたのかもしれませんね」: Satoshi: "...They might have been wiped off."

ただそこらに置いておいた瓶を綺麗に拭く人なんていやしない。: No one wipes a bottle clean just to leave it lying around.
智士「つまり犯人は楽器の置いてある部屋に逃げ込んだと云う事でしょうか」: Satoshi: "So that means the culprit fled into the instrument room."

ぼくが紅緒さんが倒れているのを見てこの部屋に入ってから、ずっと正面の扉は開いたま: From the moment I saw Benio-san fallen and entered this room, the front door had been open.
あかねさんが来て想子さんが来て、御巫先生がやってきて……: Akane-san came, then Souko-san, then Dr. Mikanagi...
不審な動きをしている人がいればすぐに判る筈だけど……: If someone had been acting suspicious, we should have noticed...
想子「……あの時間、妙な行動をとっている人が居なかったか全員に尋ねてみましょう」: Souko: "...Let's ask everyone if they saw anyone acting strange around that time."
ここでただ漠然と考えていても埒があかない。: Vaguely thinking about it here wasn't going to help.
全員を集めて聞き込みをしよう。: We should gather everyone and start questioning.
ほぼ全員が大広間に集まっていた。: Almost everyone was gathered in the main hall.
ただ……藍さん、それに六曜さんがいない。: Except... Ai-san and Rokuyou-san weren't there.
紅緒さんと御巫先生は医務室にいる。: Benio-san and Dr. Mikanagi were in the clinic.
本当は紅緒さんに直接尋ねた方がいいのだろうけれど、それは後にしよう。: Ideally, I should ask Benio-san directly, but that can wait.
智士「今回は二時過ぎの行動を訊いていけばいいですよね？」: Satoshi: "We should ask about everyone's movements after 2:00, right?"
一応想子さんに確認する。: I checked with Souko-san just in case.
想子「そうね……ただ、全員の所在確認をしたでしょ？ みんな部屋に居たりしてバラバ: Souko: "Right... but we already confirmed everyone's location, didn't we? Everyone was in their rooms or scattered about, so it might not mean much."
智士「それでも訊かないよりましですよ。後で紅緒さんに詳しく訊ねる必要はあるでしょ: Satoshi: "Still, it's better than not asking at all. I'll need to ask Benio-san for details later anyway."
想子「そうね。じゃあ気になることなども訊いていきましょう」: Souko: "True. Let's ask if they noticed anything unusual too."
想子「……結局、あまり収穫は無かったわね」: Souko: "...In the end, we didn't gain much."
智士「……あとで紅緒さんに詳しく訊いてみます」: Satoshi: "...I'll try asking Benio-san for more details later."
少なくとも危険が迫っていた紅緒さんを救うことはできたのだ。: At the very least, I was able to save Benio-san when she was in danger.
想子「……きみは今の段階で、誰が犯人だと思ってる？」: Souko: "...At this stage, who do you think the culprit is?"
智士「……想子さん、と云う可能性もありますよね」: Satoshi: "...There's the possibility it's you, Souko-san."
智士「いや、気を悪くしないでくださいよ。そりゃ動機も何もないし、違うってのはわか: Satoshi: "Hey, don't get mad. I know you have no motive and it's not you."

本人を目の前にして言ってしまったのでとても気まずい。: I'd said it right to her face, which made things very awkward.
想子「先ず身内から疑うのは悪くないわよ。きちんと理由があるのならね」: Souko: "It's not bad to suspect those close to you first. As long as you have a proper reason."
笑いながら想子さんはぼくの肩を叩いた。: Souko-san laughed and patted my shoulder.

智士「……摩夜さんが犯人の可能性はありますか？」: Satoshi: "...Is it possible Maya-san is the culprit?"

智士「……そうなんですよね……でも、遺産が絡むとしたら……」: Satoshi: "...That's the thing... but if inheritance is involved..."
想子「実の娘でも手に掛ける……そうかしら？」: Souko: "Killing her own daughter... do you think so?"
智士「わかりません。何の確証もありませんから」: Satoshi: "I don't know. I have no proof at all."
智士「……藍さんが犯人の可能性はあるでしょうか」: Satoshi: "...Is it possible Ai-san is the culprit?"
この目でしっかりと死んだ藍さんを見ているのだ。: I saw the dead Ai-san with my own eyes.
そこから動き出す事なんてない。: There's no way she's moving around.

辻村「……あの部屋は、旦那様が亡くなられてからずっと閉ざされております。そう奥様: Tsujimura: "...That room has been closed ever since the Master passed away. The Madam decided it should be so..."
智士「こっそり開けることは出来ませんか……？」: Satoshi: "Is there no way you could open it for me in secret...?"
どうしても開けられない理由があるのか、単に管理人としての責務を果たそうとしている: I couldn't tell if there was a specific reason it couldn't be opened, or if he was simply trying to fulfill his duty as the manager—
智士「……こちらこそすみません、無理なお願いをしてしまいまして……」: Satoshi: "...No, I should be the one apologizing for asking such an unreasonable thing..."
辻村「いえ、お気になさらず……」: Tsujimura: "No, please do not trouble yourself over it..."
顔を上げた辻村さんは僅かに安堵の表情を浮かべていた。: When Tsujimura-san looked up, he seemed to have a faint expression of relief on his face.
何故かなるみさんがぼくの部屋の中に居た。: For some reason, Narumi-san was inside my room.
なるみ「ちょっと相談があってさ。鍵は開けさせて貰ったよ」: Narumi: "I needed to talk to you about something. I let myself in."
まるで何の不思議もないようになるみさんは話し出す。: Narumi-san began speaking as if there were nothing strange about it at all.
声がして身体が揺さぶられる。: A voice called out, and my body was shaken.
ゆっくりと目を開けると、目の前になるみさんが居た。: When I slowly opened my eyes, Narumi-san was standing right in front of me.
なるみ「ちょっと話があったから来たんだけど」: Narumi: "I came because I wanted to talk."
生返事をしてぼくは布団を被った。: I gave a half-hearted reply and pulled the covers over my head.
智士「……もうぼくには何も関係ないことですよ」: Satoshi: "...It has nothing to do with me anymore."
何もする気にはなれない。: I didn't feel like doing anything.
気付いた時には、ぼくの身体は床に転がっていた。: Before I knew it, I was sprawling on the floor.
左頬がじんじんと痛む。: My left cheek throbbed with pain.
なるみ「腐るのも大概にしなよ！？ あんたがうじうじとしてたらこっちまで腐ってくる: Narumi: "Stop moping around already! When you start acting all pathetic like this, it makes me feel like garbage too!"
なるみさんの手がまたぼくの襟元を掴む。: Narumi-san's hand grabbed my collar again.
なるみ「そのまま布団にくるまってりゃ切原さんは生き返るのかい！？ ふざけんじゃな: Narumi: "Do you think Kirihara-san will come back to life if you stay curled up in your blankets!? Don't screw around with me, and stop pretending to be the protagonist of some tragedy!!"
なるみ「だったらしゃんとしな！ 無念を晴らそうって気持ちがあるんだったらね！」: Narumi: "Then pull yourself together! If you actually care about settling the score for her!"
智士「ぼくは……想子さんを殺した犯人を捕まえたいです……」: Satoshi: "I... I want to catch the person who killed Souko-san..."
それはきっと、ぼくにしか出来ないから。: Because I'm surely the only one who can.
なるみ「隠し財産の事は知ってる？」: Narumi: "Do you know about the hidden inheritance?"
智士「隠し財産……高嶺さんが言ってましたね。でもあるかどうかもわからないようなも: Satoshi: "Hidden inheritance... Takamine-san mentioned it. But we don't even know if it actually exists, right...?"
なるみ「あたしの予想じゃきっとある。暗号みたいなのもあったでしょ？」: Narumi: "My hunch says it definitely does. There was that code too, right?"
ぼくは書き留めていた文字列をなるみさんに見せた。: I showed the string of characters I had written down to Narumi-san.
なるみ「きっとこれが隠し財産への鍵だと思うのよ」: Narumi: "I'm sure this is the key to the hidden inheritance."
なるみ「そりゃまあ、色々調べたから。あの弁護士が石頭でね、どうしてもこの暗号が手: Narumi: "Well, I've done a lot of digging. That lawyer is such a blockhead; I couldn't get my hands on this code no matter what I tried."
智士「……それで高嶺さんの部屋にある写真の事も知っていたんですね」: Satoshi: "...So that's why you knew about the photo in Takamine-san's room."
紙に書き写した『１ＳＯ Ｋ Ｈ５ ／ １ＳＮ ＫＡＭＩＮ』と云う文字列。: The characters I'd copied onto the paper read: "1SO K H5 / 1SN KAMIN."
なるみ「あたしに聞かないでよ。でも……この最後のは何かの単語みたいだけど……」: Narumi: "Don't ask me. But... that last part looks like some kind of word..."
智士「カミン……カーミンでしょうか……英語っぽくはないですね……恒星さんと関わり: Satoshi: "Kamin... Carmin? It doesn't sound like English... maybe it's a language from a country Kousei-san had ties to..."
なるみ「あとこれって前後でふたつにわけられるわね。『１ＳＯ Ｋ Ｈ５』と『１ＳＮ: Narumi: "Also, this can be split into two parts. '1SO K H5' and '1SN KAMIN'."
智士「始まりはどちらも『１Ｓ』ですか……後ろの『Ｏ』と『Ｎ』も含めて同じような意: Satoshi: "They both start with '1S'... Including the 'O' and 'N' that follow, they likely have a similar meaning."
手帳に文字列を書き写し終わったなるみさんが立ち上がった。: Having finished copying the characters into her notebook, Narumi-san stood up.
なるみ「それじゃあたしも一旦部屋に戻って考えてみるわ。行動開始はもう少し遅くなっ: Narumi: "Well then, I'll head back to my room and think about it. Let's wait a bit longer before we start moving."
やや強引になるみさんに押し切られてしまったけど……: I had been somewhat overwhelmed by Narumi-san's assertiveness...
今はそれでいい。: But that was fine for now.
暗号の解読が想子さんを殺した犯人を突き止める事に繋がるとは思えないけれど、だけど: I didn't think deciphering a code would lead me to Souko-san's killer, but I knew this house was hiding a secret.
それに巻き込まれて、想子さんが殺されたのだとしたら――: And if Souko-san was killed because she got caught up in it—
それを解明する事が、犯人に繋がるのかもしれない。: Then uncovering it might be the only path to the culprit.
……そうとでも考えておかないと、今のぼくは何も出来やしない。: ...If I didn't believe that, I wouldn't be able to do anything at all right now.
ぼくも少し調べてみよう。: I should do some investigating myself.
後半の『ＫＡＭＩＮ』と云う単語の意味さえわかれば――: If only I knew the meaning of that word in the second half, "KAMIN"—
御巫先生はまだ起きているのか、医務室の明かりが洩れている。: The light from the clinic was still visible; Dr. Mikanagi must still be awake.
ぼくはその隣の書斎へ向かう。: I headed to the study next door.
書斎の中には誰も居ない。: There was no one inside the study.
まあ、この時間だからな……: Well, given the hour, that wasn't surprising...
紅緒「……ちょっと気が昂ぶっていてな。本でも読んで落ち着こうと思っていたんだが…: Benio: "...I was feeling a bit restless. I thought reading a book might help me calm down..."
智士「そうでしたか……あ、そうだ。紅緒さん、これなんですけど……」: Satoshi: "I see... oh, right. Benio-san, about this..."
ぼくは紅緒さんに暗号を見せた。: I showed the code to Benio-san.
紅緒「記号か……？ いや、最後のこれはきちんとした単語のようだが……何と云う意味: Benio: "Symbols...? No, this last part looks like a proper word... I wonder what it means..."
紅緒「前にも見たな。最後の単語の意味がわかればいいんだが……」: Benio: "I've seen this before. If only we knew the meaning of that last word..."
智士「恐らく恒星さんにゆかりのある言語だと思うんですが……」: Satoshi: "It's likely a language that Kousei-san was familiar with..."
紅緒「父上にか……そうだ、ドイツ語かもしれんな」: Benio: "Father... right, it might be German."
紅緒「音楽に関わりの深い言語はドイツ語とイタリア語だが、父上はドイツ語圏の友人も: Benio: "German and Italian are the languages most closely tied to music, and Father had many friends in German-speaking regions. Wait a second."
紅緒さんはそういうと書庫の本棚を漁り始める。: With that, Benio-san began rummaging through the shelves in the library.
紅緒「確かこのあたりに……あった。これだ」: Benio: "I'm sure it was around here... ah, here it is. This one."
黒い革で出来た小さな本を取り出してきた。: She pulled out a small book bound in black leather.
紅緒「独和辞典だ。これがあれば理解出来ると思うが……『ＫＡＭＩＮ』だったな」: Benio: "A German-Japanese dictionary. We should be able to figure it out with this... It was 'KAMIN', right?"
紅緒さんが椅子に座って辞書をめくる。: Benio-san sat in a chair and flipped through the dictionary.
紅緒「Ｋ……Ｋ……あった。これだ」: Benio: "K... K... Found it. This is it."
確かに、この館には各部屋に暖炉が備え付けられているけれど……: True, every room in this mansion was equipped with a fireplace...
紅緒「私が知るはずないだろう？ これが何だか知らんのだからな。そもそも、父上ゆか: Benio: "How should I know? I don't even know what this is. For that matter, why are you investigating something of Father's?"
智士「それは……遺書に記されていたものだからですよ」: Satoshi: "Well... it was written in his will."
紅緒「遺書にねえ……父上が何かを伝えたかったのだろうが……それが暗号とはね。まる: Benio: "In his will, hmm... Father must have wanted to convey something... but to use a code. It's as if he didn't want us to know about it."
智士「どうなんでしょうね……隠し財産かなにかじゃないかとは思っているんですが……: Satoshi: "I wonder... I was thinking it might be a hidden inheritance or something..."
紅緒「……だとしても、見つけたものの総取りなんて事にはならんだろ」: Benio: "...Even if it is, it's not like whoever finds it gets to keep it all."
……なるみさんがどう思っているかは知らないけど。: ...Though I didn't know what Narumi-san was thinking.
智士「……とにかく、暖炉ですよ。そこかしこにありますけど……」: Satoshi: "...Anyway, a fireplace. They're all over the place..."
紅緒「だからといって片っ端から調べる訳にもいかんだろ？ 各人の部屋にある暖炉まで: Benio: "But that doesn't mean we can just go checking every single one of them, does it? Can you really investigate the fireplaces in everyone's private rooms?"
智士「……今の状況だと難しいですよね……」: Satoshi: "...That would be difficult given the current situation..."
紅緒「私からは余計な真似はするなとしか言えんな。この家の者として」: Benio: "As a member of this family, all I can tell you is not to do anything unnecessary."
紅緒さんが辞書を棚に戻す。: Benio-san put the dictionary back on the shelf.
紅緒「……まあ、私個人としては好きにやっても構わないと思うぞ。隠し財産などが出て: Benio: "...Well, personally, I don't care if you do whatever you like. I doubt any hidden inheritance is actually going to turn up anyway."
さて……少しここで調べ物をしてみようか。: Now then... I think I'll do a little research here myself.
『Ｈ・Ｐ・ラヴクラフト全集』と書かれた本が並んでいる。: A row of books titled "The Complete Works of H.P. Lovecraft" are lined up.
なんと云うか……この家の誰がこの本を読んでいるのだろうか……: I have to wonder... who in this house is reading these?
ラヴクラフト全集が置かれている。: The Complete Works of Lovecraft is here.
『陰秘学大全』と書かれた本が並んでいる。: A row of books titled "The Encyclopedia of Occultism" are lined up.
誰の本だろう……: I wonder whose books these are...
『ソロモンの鍵』や『グリモリウム・ウェルム』など、海外の本が多く並べられている。: Many foreign books like "The Key of Solomon" and "Grimorium Verum" are lined up.
これって……確か、魔術書とか云われている本じゃなかったっけ……: Wait... weren't these supposed to be grimoires or something...
魔術書と呼ばれる類の本が置かれている。: Books of the type called grimoires are here.
『遠野物語』をはじめとした、東北地方の民間伝承をまとめた本が置かれている。: Books compiling the folklore of the Tohoku region, including "Tono Monogatari," are here.
東北の民俗に関する本が置かれている。: Books regarding Tohoku folklore are here.
『Ｄｉｅ Ｇｅｓｃｈｉｃｈｔｅ ｄｅｕｔｓｃｈｅｒ Ｍｕｓｉｋ』と表紙に書かれて: "Die Geschichte deutscher Musik" is written on the cover.
えっと……ドイツ語だろうか。内容がよくわからない。: Um... is this German? I can't really understand the content.
音楽記号が書かれているから、そっち関係の本なのだろうけど……: There are musical symbols written in it, so it's likely a book related to that field...
ドイツ語で書かれた音楽の本のようだ。: It appears to be a book on music written in German.
どうやら独和辞典のようだ。: It appears to be a German-Japanese dictionary.
これさえあれば単語の意味くらいは理解出来そうだけど、文法やなにやらはわからないか: With this, I could probably understand the meanings of individual words, but without knowing the grammar, reading a book would be difficult.
これは……ドイツ語で書かれた旅行のガイドブックのようだ。: This... appears to be a travel guidebook written in German.
行ってみたいとは思うけど、無理だよなあ……: I'd like to visit, but that's impossible...
ドイツの旅行ガイドのようだ。: It appears to be a German travel guide.
上野で起こった連続殺人事件を遊郭に身を寄せている探偵が解決していく内容のようだ。: The content seems to be about a detective living in a brothel who solves a series of murders in Ueno.
タイトルは……おっと、こんなところで読みふける訳にもいかないし、またの機会にして: The title is... oops, I can't exactly get lost in a book here. I'll save it for another time.
どうやらこの本はドイツの戦争史を取り扱っているようだ。: It seems this book covers German military history.
ふたつの大戦と、その後の東西分裂について書かれている。: It's written about the two World Wars and the subsequent division of East and West.
ドイツの歴史書のようだ。: It appears to be a German history book.
目に付いた本をめくる。: I flipped through a book that caught my eye.
音階やら何やら、ぼくにはよくわからない。: Scales and such... I don't really understand any of it.
『ドレミファソラシド』が英語では『ＣＤＥＦＧＡＢＣ』、さらにドイツでは『ＣＤＥＦ: It says things like "Do-Re-Mi-Fa-Sol-La-Ti-Do" is "C-D-E-F-G-A-B-C" in English, and further becomes "C-D-E-F-G-A-H-C" in German.
音楽の成績なんて思い出したくもないからなあ……: I don't even want to remember my music grades...
本に挟まっていた紙切れが目にとまった。: A scrap of paper tucked into the book caught my eye.
私の名前は七月恒星。ただの作曲家である。: My name is Kousei Nanatsuki. I am but a simple composer.
ここにある経験談を残しておくことにした。とても自分ひとりの心にしまっておくにはお: I have decided to leave a record of my experiences here. They were events far too hideous to keep locked away in my own heart.
これを見つけたものは心して読むがいい。 ～つづく～: Let those who find this read with care. ~To be continued~

推理小説のようだ。: It appears to be a mystery novel.

建築学の本のようだ。: It appears to be a book on architecture.
地図の解説書のようだ。: It appears to be a guidebook for maps.

どうやら推理小説のようだ。: It appears to be a mystery novel.

奇妙な絵画に描かれた女性とうり二つの少女や、虫好きの妹が出てきたりしている。: A girl who is the spitting image of a woman in a strange painting and a younger sister who loves insects appear in it.
時間も時間だし、一旦部屋に戻って考えるとしよう。: Given the time, I'll head back to my room and think things over.
廊下に出ると、医務室から声が聞こえてきた。: When I stepped into the corridor, I heard voices coming from the clinic.
紅緒さんと御巫先生が喋っているようだ。: It sounded like Benio-san and Dr. Mikanagi were talking.
紅緒さんから話を聞いていたのだろう、御巫先生がそう訊ねてきた。: Having likely heard the story from Benio-san, Dr. Mikanagi asked me.
智士「わかったようなわからないような……微妙な所です」: Satoshi: "I'm not really sure... it's a bit of a toss-up."
御巫「……きみが調べている事が今回の件と関係あるのかどうかがわからないからね。あ: Mikanagi: "...We don't know if what you're investigating has anything to do with the current case. I can't exactly offer my support openly, but—"
紅緒「これ以上の被害が出なければそれでいいさ。夜が明ければ麓から人が来るだろうか: Benio: "As long as there are no more victims, that's enough. People from the foot of the mountain should be coming at daybreak, after all."

むしろ――ぼくが犯人だとしたら、必ず行動を起こすだろう。: In fact—if I were the culprit, I would certainly take action.
そう云った時に、こんな事を調べていていいのだろうか。: Is it really okay to be investigating something like this at a time like this?
紅緒「必ずふたりか三人で一緒にいるようにすれば、誰が犯人であっても犯行を防げるだ: Benio: "If we make sure to stay in groups of two or three, we should be able to prevent any crimes regardless of who the culprit is... but it's already the middle of the night..."

紅緒「お前も絶対安全とはいえないのだから気をつけろよ」: Benio: "You aren't exactly in a position of absolute safety either, so be careful."
想子さんまで殺されてしまったのだから、ぼくが安全圏に居るとは思えない。: Now that even Souko-san has been killed, I didn't feel like I was in a safe zone.
想子さんも警告を受けたのだから、ぼくが安全圏に居るとは思えない。: Now that Souko-san has received a warning as well, I didn't feel like I was in a safe zone.
智士「ぼくはしばらくなるみさんと行動を共にして暗号について調べるつもりです」: Satoshi: "I plan to stick with Narumi-san for a while and investigate the code."
訝しげな表情を浮かべた紅緒さんだったがすぐに頷いた。: Benio-san looked suspicious for a moment but nodded quickly.

……自称大泥棒のなるみさんはどうなのかわからないけど。: ...Though I didn't know about Narumi-san, the self-proclaimed master thief.
部屋に戻って暫く待っていると、扉が叩かれた。: I went back to my room and waited for a while until there was a knock on the door.
返事をする前に扉が開き、なるみさんが入ってきた。: Before I could answer, the door opened and Narumi-san walked in.
智士「いいですけど……御巫先生に釘を刺されましたよ。無茶はしないでくれって」: Satoshi: "I guess... Dr. Mikanagi warned me, though. He told us not to do anything reckless."
なるみ「無茶なんてするつもりないわよ」: Narumi: "I don't have any intention of being reckless."
どこまで本当かわからないけど。: I didn't know how much of that was true.
なるみ「取り敢えずは暗号よ。あれからなにかわかった？」: Narumi: "First is the code. Did you figure anything out since then?"
智士「紅緒さんに聞いて、最後の単語がドイツ語で『暖炉』と云う意味だとわかりました: Satoshi: "I asked Benio-san, and I found out the last word means 'fireplace' in German."
なるみ「暖炉……いっぱいあるわよ？」: Narumi: "Fireplace... there are a lot of those."
智士「ええ……だからこの『１ＳＮ』と云うのが場所を表していると思うんですよ」: Satoshi: "Yeah... so I think this '1SN' part represents a location."
